calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Janet Pond.
Petitioner, Margherita Mele present with minor in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Clara Sofia Mele.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-25-2003 Reset To Nov-20-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Margaret Del Coto

Petitioner Margherita Mele present with minor in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The matter is continued to Nov. 20, 2003 at 9:00 am in Dept 218. Petitioner needs to serve notice on minor's father, incarcerated in Sacramento. Service by mail is acceptable to the Commissioner.
